title: 50 Greatest Bollywood Films of All Time
description: From Mughal-E-Azam to Dangal — the films that defined Hindi cinema across eight decades.
intro: Bollywood has produced over 100,000 films since its inception. These 50 are the ones that transcend time — films that defined generations, broke records, changed the industry, and continue to be watched, rewatched, and argued about. Ranked by Navras score, cultural impact, and enduring relevance.

entries.blurb: India's most magnificent epic. A landmark in world cinema.

film.title: Mughal-E-Azam
film.verdict: India's most magnificent epic. A landmark in world cinema.

entries.blurb: The film that gave Indian romance its modern face. Timeless.

film.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
film.verdict: The film that gave Indian romance its modern face.

entries.blurb: Guru Dutt's masterpiece. Poetry in motion.

film.title: Pyaasa
film.verdict: Guru Dutt's masterpiece. Poetry in motion.

entries.blurb: The film that took India to the Oscars and deserved to win.

film.title: Lagaan
film.verdict: Nominated for Best Foreign Film, Oscars 2002. India's greatest Oscar moment.

entries.blurb: Changed how India thinks about children and learning.

film.title: Taare Zameen Par
film.verdict: Changed how India thinks about children and learning.

entries.blurb: The greatest sports film India has produced. Also its biggest.

film.title: Dangal
film.verdict: The film that proved Indian sport could power world cinema.

entries.blurb: The most rewatched Indian film of its generation.

film.title: 3 Idiots
film.verdict: Still the most rewatched film on Netflix India.

entries.blurb: The original Indian blockbuster. Jai and Veeru forever.

film.title: Sholay
film.verdict: The original Indian blockbuster. Jai and Veeru forever.

entries.blurb: The cleverest thriller Bollywood has ever made.

film.title: Andhadhun
film.verdict: The cleverest thriller Bollywood has ever made.

entries.blurb: The most original Indian horror film ever made.

film.title: Tumbbad
film.verdict: Watch it tonight with the lights off.
